benefits.description: Lost 6.5 kg in 11 weeks with body fat % declining from 24.2% to 18.4%. Visually leaner face, visible abs, waist reduced from 30 to 28 inches. Body fat loss accelerated after increasing dose to 5 mg.
Muscle loss of only 0.8 kg over the 11-week period despite aggressive fat loss. Visceral fat reported as very low on multiple scans.

side_effects.description: Bowel movements not optimal but tolerable

protocol_notes: Protocol: 2 mg weekly for 4 weeks, then 2.5 mg weekly for 4 weeks, then 5 mg weekly (final dose). Previously used Tirzepatide (7.5 mg) before switching to Retatrutide. Briefly attempted Tesamorelin and CJC-DAC but discontinued due to needle anxiety and loss of vial respectively. Also used SLU-PP-332 a few times before stopping due to unrelated medication. Supplemented with creatine, natural testosterone boosters, vitamin D3+K3, and sleep supplements. Diet: aimed for 1200 kcal/day and 120g protein (averaged 80g); primarily lean meats, rice, and fruits. Training: 3x/week lifting plus 1-2x/week cardio (walking, HIIT). Noted that weight loss stalled at 2.5 mg dose but accelerated significantly at 5 mg. User notes possible inaccuracy due to using different InBody machines for scans. Previously on Tirzepatide and lost 6 kg (74 to 68 kg) before transitioning to Retatrutide.
